title: Touhou Little Maid, crafts without shrine
description:
A Touhou Little Maid datapack that makes all items in the mod able to be crafted without the need of the shrine and the power points.
The recipes can be seen in JEI, but im also publising all the item recipes in the gallery, in case u dont like the mod.
body:
A mod focused in adding the crafts of Touhou Little Maid items with no need of the shrine, u should be able to craft every item (with the exception of 3) in the mod with a normal crafting table, no shrines, no p points, just easy and basic crafting.


thought, there are **3** items that i did not make crafteable, the first one being the maid spawn/box/present, the second one being the lighting bolt spawn, and the third and last one being the maid resurrection tool, i think that those three items are just too broken to be able to be crafted in a normal crafting table. (also the resurrection item is bugged and can just give you a free maid instead of reviving one)


That should be all, o, also, i recomend installing JEI, so you can see easly all the new crafts, but if u dont want to install it, there is no problem, i will be leaving all the recipes that this datapack adds in the gallery.

lastly, this datapack was made in part with the TheDestruc7i0n's Crafting Generator, here is a link to the page: [Crafting](https://crafting.thedestruc7i0n.ca/)

now, thats all, hope u like this datapack.
